default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and define the strategy for new talent cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** The focus is shifting from high-volume publishing to high-quality content, driven by a recent rewrite of \~90 articles that has improved brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Capacity Constraint:** The current 3-editor team can effectively manage 2–3 talent cohorts simultaneously to maintain quality and avoid context-switching.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Quality vs. Speed:** A trade-off exists between content quality and publishing speed. GrowthX will provide examples of three quality tiers to inform a strategic decision for DataAnnotation.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**New Cohort Priority:** DataAnnotation's initial priority is Coder, Multilingual, and Finance cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Pivot

  - [**Performance Plateau:** Traffic has plateaued after an initial spike.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a normal SEO pattern for competitive keywords. Initial ranking is fast, but sustained growth requires high-quality content and backlinks built over several months.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus is moving from high-volume publishing to high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX is nearly finished rewriting \~90 existing articles to meet a higher quality bar.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### New Cohort Strategy & Capacity

  - [DataAnnotation needs a clear strategy for expanding into new talent cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Capacity Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Current Team:** 3 editors.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Effective Capacity:** 2–3 cohorts simultaneously.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This limit avoids editor context-switching, which is critical for maintaining high quality.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Scaling:** More cohorts would require adding staff and restructuring the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Defining Content Quality Tiers

  - [DataAnnotation wants to understand the trade-offs of different quality levels to make a strategic decision.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Proposed Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Tier 1 (Initial):** High-volume, SEO-focused content using existing internal info.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Tier 2 (Current):** Higher quality, brand-aligned content using internal info + external research.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Tier 3 (Future):** Highest quality, featuring original research and subject matter expert interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Trade-off:** Higher quality (Tiers 2/3) requires more time per article, which reduces publishing volume.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Recommendation:** Use a hybrid model. Publish at Tier 2, then invest in Tier 3 for top-performing articles that show strong potential.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### CTA & Testimonial Initiatives

  - [**CTA Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Idea:** Test CTAs designed to look like job postings, as this format performs well for other clients.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Status:** DataAnnotation is currently split-testing a similar landing page version.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [**Testimonial Collection:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Status:** Jeansalazar is reviewing coder profiles to select 1–3 for testimonials.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will provide an email template for Jeansalazar to notify selected coders before GrowthX's outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Provide a quantifiable capacity analysis for 2–3 cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [Send examples of the three quality tiers to Nancy today.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [Create an email template for Jeansalazar to notify testimonial candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [Propose CTA improvements based on DataAnnotation's job-posting landing page draft.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**Jeansalazar:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [Select 1–3 coder profiles for testimonials by EOW/early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [Notify selected coders using GrowthX's template before GrowthX's outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/5DbJsgLF8ZyypEWrjfbcL9EBxhf1Qmbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

action_items.description: Send capacity/staffing plan + outcomes to Nancy; then Nancy do back-of-envelope 2–3 cohort math
Review testimonials; send 1–3 coder profiles to Liz/Jason; then GrowthX send outreach template
